documentation.value: Declares a variable with a specified type in PL/A.
The name of the variable to declare.
The data type (e.g., FIXED, FLOAT, CHAR, BIT).
Outputs one or more expressions to the standard output stream in list-directed format.
The expression(s) to output.
Reads one or more values from the standard input stream in list-directed format.
The variable(s) to store input values.
Extracts a substring from a string starting at the given position.
The source string.
The 1-based start position.
The number of characters to extract.
Returns the current length of a varying-length character string.
The string to measure.
Returns the position of the first occurrence of a substring within a string. Returns 0 if not found.
The string to search in.
The substring to search for.
Returns the absolute value of a numeric expression.
A numeric expression.
Returns the remainder of integer division.
The number to divide.
The number to divide by.
